overview: Physician-led medical practice specializing in testosterone and hormone replacement therapy (TRT/HRT) for men and women, along with medical weight loss, sexual health, aesthetic, and regenerative medicine services. Care is delivered through a concierge medical model emphasizing personalization and long-term results.
highlights: Physician-led practice with 11+ years serving Oregon and Washington
Services include TRT, HRT, GLP-1 weight loss, sexual health, aesthetics, and regenerative therapies
targetAudience: Men and women seeking hormone replacement therapy and related anti-aging treatments.
